strengths: EN/ES parity is tight across all 6 pairs — headings, link counts, and structural sections mirror each other consistently
run-and-test.md is exceptionally thorough with 6 staged validation steps, a flow diagram, and 22 internal links covering the full dev-to-release loop
gaps: support-matrix-advanced-protocols.md has a duplicate 'Related links' heading in both EN and ES, indicating a structural copy-paste error
data-access-patterns.md lacks a reference to authentication/secrets docs despite covering DB connection patterns where credential handling is critical
fixes: Remove the second 'Related links' / 'Enlaces relacionados' heading in support-matrix-advanced-protocols.md (both EN and ES) and merge its links into the single related section

Add a link to secrets/config how-to (how-to/deploy-to-production.md or tutorial/from-zero/3-config-and-secrets.md) in the data-access-patterns Related links section to close the credential-handling gap
